why_en: Turn 3 sustains worry ('not done worrying about you, so don't think this is over'), but turn 4 lets 'any trace of worry melt off her face' and snaps back to pure teasing ('nerd'), abandoning the crisis on the decisive turn.
why_zh: Zh mirrors en: turn 3 keeps '我没打算不担心你', but turn 4 has the worry '一下子散开' and returns to banter ('笨蛋'), dropping the crisis frame on the final turn.
